author: y4rr
content:
Plan: Implement C9.2 conformance suite covering 7 ferrotorch-nn modules per the dispatch spec.

Modules in scope:
1. norm.rs — LayerNorm, GroupNorm, BatchNorm1d/2d/3d, InstanceNorm1d/2d/3d, RMSNorm, LocalResponseNorm
2. activation.rs — ReLU, Sigmoid, Tanh, GELU, SiLU, Softmax, LogSoftmax, ELU, SELU, Mish, LeakyReLU, etc.
3. loss.rs — MSELoss, CrossEntropyLoss, BCELoss, BCEWithLogitsLoss, L1Loss, NLLLoss
4. init.rs — uniform, normal, xavier_uniform, xavier_normal, kaiming_uniform, kaiming_normal, constant, zeros, ones
5. functional.rs — linear, relu, sigmoid, tanh, gelu, silu, softmax, layer_norm, batch_norm
6. lazy_norm.rs — LazyLayerNorm (if present)
7. utils.rs — clip_grad_norm_, clip_grad_value_

Steps:
1. Create ferrotorch-nn/tests/conformance/fixtures/ directory
2. Write scripts/regenerate_nn_norm_fixtures.py for all 7 modules (torch==2.11.0 pin)
3. Run fixture script to generate ferrotorch-nn/tests/conformance/fixtures/nn_norm_activation_loss.json
4. Write ferrotorch-nn/tests/conformance_nn_norm_activation_loss.rs as Layer 3 conformance test
5. Verify cargo test -p ferrotorch-nn --test conformance_nn_norm_activation_loss passes
6. File cascade bugs (cascade_skip) for any failures found
7. Run cascade-skip + crosslink-quick pattern for bugs discovered

Constraint: NO bug fixing. Cascade-skip + file issues only.
